footer.quote: The first therapy appointment should feel safe, not like a guess.

authGateway.signinTitle: Choose how you want to continue
authGateway.signupTitle: Choose which account you want to create
authGateway.description: You can continue as a client to save your recommendations, or as a therapist to manage your public profile and responses.
authGateway.clientDescription: Save recommendation results, return to them later, and keep your next steps in one place.
authGateway.therapistDescription: Finish onboarding, update your profile, and manage the information clients see.
